target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Target is an armored vehicle with visible fire, thick smoke, and structural deformation indicating catastrophic damage; no intact major components remain.

summary: One military equipment target has been assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence. The scene depicts a single armored vehicle lying on its side in a ditch, emitting thick smoke and showing severe structural damage with visible fire, consistent with the prior assessment. The likely functional impact is complete loss of operational capability for the target.
